steps: Grow cell 50 mL of TSB, let incubate Overnight
Distributed 17 mL of culture into two 50 mL centrifuge tubes, and 10 mL into one 20 mL centrifuge tube
Centrifuge down for 00:20:00 at 4300rpm ( 4303 xg) 4 °C
Aspirate media from cultures; wash cells 3x with TE aspirate.
Lyse cells by resuspending in 1 mL of the different lysis buffers

20 millimolar (mM), Tris Cl , 15 millimolar (mM), NaCl , 0.9696% Triton pH 7.5 (labelled A) Phosphatase Inhibitor: 50 millimolar (mM), NaF , 1 millimolar (mM), Sodium Orthovanadate , 10 millimolar (mM), Sodium Pyrophosphate and 10 millimolar (mM), B-glycerophosphate EDTA-free Protease tablet (1 tablet per 10 mL )
Centrifuged at 13000 rpm for 00:05:00

1% SDS, 10 mL, Tris Cl , 1 millimolar (mM), EDTA (labelled B) Phosphatase Inhibitor: 50 millimolar (mM), NaF , 1 millimolar (mM), Sodium Orthovanadate , 10 millimolar (mM), Sodium Pyrophosphate and 10 millimolar (mM), B-glycerophosphate EDTA-free Protease tablet (1 tablet per 10 mL )
Freeze thaw 3 times
Sonicated for 00:01:00 , repeat 5 times
Bradford Assay
Combine 40 µL 4X Laemmli to cell lysate, 40 µL of Lysis A and Lysis B
Load 40 µL o onto SDS-PAGE gel and 40 µL of All Blue Precision Plus for ladder
Soaked sponges and transfer paper in Transfer Buffer
Soak PVDF membrane in Methanol
Soak fiber pads thoroughly in a Transfer Buffer
Make the blotting sandwich
Electrotransfer to PVDF membrane at 30 mV Overnight
Add 1 cm depth of Transfer Buffer to container and insert plastic cassette with black side down, lay a wet fiber pad on the black side of the cassette
Lay one wet blotting paper on the fiber pad and roll out air bubbles
Lay gel squarely on blotting paper and roll out air bubbles
Lay wet PVDF on the gel and roll out air bubbles
Lay one wet blotting paper on the membrane and roll out air bubbles
Lay a wet fiber pad on top of the blotting paper and close the cassette and clamp together with the white clip.
After transfer, wash PVDF membrane with 25 mL, TBS for 00:05:00 at Room temperature
Incubate membrane in 25 mL, Blocking Buffer for 01:00:00 at Room temperature
Wash three times for 00:05:00 each with 15 mL, TBST
Incubate membrane in Primary Antibody (at 1:2000) in a 10 mL, Primary Antibody Dilution Buffer with gentle agitation Overnight
Wash three times for 00:05:00 each with 15 mL, TBST
Incubate membrane with Anti-mouse IgG, HRP-linked Antibody (1:1000) to detect biotinylated protein markers in 10 mL, Blocking Buffer with gentle agitation for 01:00:00 at Room temperature
Wash three times for 00:05:00 each with 15 mL, TBST
Prepare 1X SignalFire™ ECL Reagent (#6883) by diluting one part 2X Reagent A and one part 2X Reagent B (based off of the size of our membrane we mixed 1 mL of each together)
Incubate substrate with membrane for 00:07:00 , remove excess solution (membrane remains wet) expose to X-ray film using an imager
Combine 7.5 g, Nonfat dry Milk with 150 mL, TBST to make Blocking Buffer
Combine 1.0 g, 5% BSA to 20 mL, 1X TBST and mix well
creator: Bethany Rozeboom
